description: Phase 2.9 Step 6 — Tier 1 speedup targets (walk + tier-2 cache vs Python). Used with scripts/benchmark-archive_crate-tier1.py --enforce.

targets.fingerprint_speedup_note: Fingerprint timing is optional; use --enforce-fingerprint only if you care (often noisy on small vaults).

how_to_record_a_run: Optionally: same command with --enforce after verifying ratios on that machine
